MASTER MOTION CALENDAR ON MAR-29-2022 IN 206, PLAINTIFF'S MOTION TO CONTINUE TRIAL DATE BY STIPULATION. CLAUDE ARMAND WYLE, ESQ. APPEARING FOR PLAINTIFF VIA COURTCALL. IAN SCHAEFFER, ESQ. APPEARING FOR DEFENDANT SATINDER SINGH VIA COURTCALL. YAKOV WIEGMAN, ESQ. APPEARING FOR DEFENDANTS UBER TECHNOLOGIES, INC., RASIER LLC, AND RASIER-CA, LLC VIA COURTCALL. THE COURT GRANTS PLAINTIFF'S MOTION TO CONTINUE TRIAL. THE TRIAL DATE OF 5/2/22 IS VACATED AND THE NEW TRIAL DATE IS 10/31/22 AT 9:30AM IN DEPT. 206. ALL PRE-TRIAL DEADLINES INCLUDING DISCOVERY, EXPERT DISCLOSURES AND MOTION PRACTICE SHALL BE GOVERNED BY THE NEW TRIAL DATE. THE COURT DID NOT RECEIVE COURTESY COPIES OF THE MOTION WHICH IS IN VIOLATION OF SF LOCAL RULE 2.7B. THE COURT ORDERS PLAINTIFF TO PAY $60.00 FILING FEE VIA E-FILING NO LATER THAN 4:00PM TODAY WHICH IS THE COST FOR FILING PAPERS THAT PLAINTIFF WOULD HAVE TO FILE AGAIN WITH A COURTESY COPY IN ORDER TO GET THE CONTINUED TRIAL DATE OF 10/31/22. PLAINTIFF TO PREPARE A PROPOSED FORM OF ORDER THAT CONFORMS TO THE COURT'S RULING THAT IS APPROVED AS TO FORM. NOTICE WAIVED BY PARTIES. JUDGE: SAMUEL K. FENG; CLERK: R. VELUZ; MATTER NOT REPORTED. (206)
